overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive school management system for Indian schools built on the Internet Computer. It covers student and staff management, fees collection, attendance (face, RFID, ESSL, QR), exam results, timetables, HR & payroll, transport, library, inventory, syllabus, and communication — all in one platform with Indian conventions (INR, Play Way–Class 12, YYYY-YY sessions).
features: Fee receipt and all printable certificates designed in Certificate Studio (drag-and-drop, user-editable)
Demand register with correct month-wise fee calculation per heading
Admit Card, Student ID, Staff ID, Bonafide, TC — all printable with editable templates
Collect Fees with old balance + previous session due auto-added
Backup and restore with Gmail and scheduled auto-backup
Attendance system selector in Settings (Face, RFID, ESSL, QR)
Advanced face attendance with continuous auto-recognition at 500ms intervals
Printable timetables (class-wise, teacher-wise, school-wide) in A4 format
